2605.04278.title: Material Database Agent: A Multimodal Agentic Framework for Scientific Literature Mining
2605.04278.paper_summary: Materials science workflows rely on structured and unstructured data from the vast body of available scientific literature. However, most of the experimental details remain buried in text, tables, graphs and figures. Thus, constructing databases that incorporate this data is a manual, time-consuming, and hard-to-scale process. Multimodal large language models have made it feasible to extract information from text and scientific figures with high speed and accuracy. This opens the possibility of an AI system that can create production-scale material databases. Material Database Agent (MDA) is a modular, multi-agent system architecture for converting research literature into structured databases. MDA accepts article PDFs as input, which are subsequently processed in parallel into markdown files and figures. Multiple sub-agents read these markdown files and figures in parallel to assemble sub-databases for each paper. These sub-databases are then compiled into a single tabular database by an agent. As opposed to using either a rule-based approach or a single-pass pipeline for extracting information, MDA is a specialized architecture for transforming the literature into a database in the field of materials science. More generally, this study provides a basis for positioning multimodal agentic information extraction as a viable means for constructing next-generation scientific databases from the primary literature.
2605.04278.paper_summary_zh: 材料科學工作流程依賴於大量可用科學文獻中的結構化和非結構化數據。<lb/>然而，大多數實驗細節仍然埋藏在文本、表格、圖形和圖像中。<lb/>因此，構建包含這些數據的數據庫是一個手動、耗時且難以擴展的過程。<lb/>多模態大型語言模型使得從文本和科學圖形中提取信息變得可行，速度快且準確性高。<lb/>這開啟了創建生產規模材料數據庫的人工智慧系統的可能性。<lb/>材料數據庫代理（MDA）是一種模塊化的多代理系統架構，用於將研究文獻轉換為結構化數據庫。<lb/>MDA 接受文章 PDF 作為輸入，這些 PDF 隨後被並行處理為 markdown 文件和圖形。<lb/>多個子代理並行閱讀這些 markdown 文件和圖形，以組裝每篇論文的子數據庫。<lb/>這些子數據庫然後由一個代理編譯成一個單一的表格數據庫。<lb/>與使用基於規則的方法或單遍管道提取信息相比，MDA 是一種專門的架構，用於將文獻轉換為材料科學領域的數據庫。<lb/>更一般地說，本研究為將多模態代理信息提取定位為從主要文獻構建下一代科學數據庫的可行手段提供了基礎。
2605.04278.author: Achuth Chandrasekhar et.al.
2605.04278.authors: Achuth Chandrasekhar, Omid Barati Farimani, Radheesh Sharma Meda, Amir Barati Farimani
